vocab.exampleEn: A checklist keeps me accountable because I can see what I have finished.
vocab.exampleZh: 清单让我更有责任感，因为我能看到完成了什么。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use accountable when discussing responsibility and teamwork.
vocab.upgradeZh: 讨论责任和团队合作时，可以用 accountable。

cycle.summaryEn: Build clean sentences with the right tense, articles, and clause control.
cycle.summaryZh: 把时态、冠词和从句控制好，句子更稳。

frame.useEn: Use at the end of an answer.

meaningEn: This speaking word helps Becky sound clearer and more natural.
meaningZh: 这个口语词可以帮助 Becky 说得更清楚、更自然。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "accountable" using Overall, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "accountable" 和 总的来说，... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
